objectives: Learn how to handle a knife safely
Understand different knife techniques such as chopping and slicing

steps.instruction: Choose a suitable cutting board and place it on a stable surface.
Hold the knife correctly with a firm grip and use the other hand to hold the food item securely.
Practice basic techniques such as chopping vegetables and slicing fruits.

conclusion: By the end of this lesson, you will be able to use a knife safely and effectively, which is essential for meal preparation.
